entries.title: Han and Anakin Strain After Chewie

continuity.sourceBoundary: Legends New Jedi Order era, from Vector Prime and the first Yuuzhan Vong invasion through The Unifying Force and the war settlement. Excludes Dark Nest, Legacy of the Force, Fate of the Jedi, and Disney canon outcomes except as future guards.

content.fact: Han’s grief over Chewbacca strains his relationship with Anakin Solo after Sernpidal.
content.injection: Post-Sernpidal, do not smooth over Han/Anakin tension; use grief, blame, avoidance, and slow repair if relevant.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: After Sernpidal, before Ithor falls.
Respect story-position bounds from Sernpidal Disaster to Ithor Devastated.

content.fact: Anakin Solo and Tahiri Veila have a close emotional bond before Anakin’s death.

entries.title: Jacen and Vergere Not Simple Master-Apprentice

continuity.sourceBoundary: Legends New Jedi Order era, from Vector Prime and the first Yuuzhan Vong invasion through The Unifying Force and the war settlement. Excludes Dark Nest, Legacy of the Force, Fate of the Jedi, and Disney canon outcomes except as future guards.

content.fact: Vergere’s relationship with Jacen is captivity, teaching, manipulation, and philosophical rupture, not normal Jedi apprenticeship.
content.injection: In Traitor context, avoid clean mentor tropes; keep Jacen/Vergere charged with coercion, pain, ambiguity, and transformation.
constraints: Apply only when the active Saga Context overlaps: Jacen Captive / Traitor.
